data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an emergency 'show all' toggle, but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this feature. The linked use case mentions the toggle, but it does not provide concrete API reads or persisted state checks to demonstrate that the toggle is implemented and operational. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to validate this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the emergency 'show all' toggle being implemented or functioning.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
